dropped_summary: The frame shows a person giving a presentation in front of an exhibit, but the content on the screen and board is not clearly legible or stable enough to serve as a reliable teaching artifact. There is no visible slide, diagram, formula, or document that is complete and distinct. The frame is more of a scene shot rather than a source-backed teaching artifact, and thus does not meet the criteria for preservation.
